description_long: This is a modern bed with a rectangular silhouette, featuring a tall, upholstered headboard in a muted olive green color. The bed frame is constructed from wood, visible at the legs and lower edge, providing a sturdy base and a warm contrast to the fabric. The mattress is covered with a fitted white sheet, and the bedding is minimal, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic. The back of the headboard is finished in a darker material, likely fabric or vinyl, for a neat appearance from all angles. The bed sits relatively low to the ground, with no visible storage or under-bed compartments. Its design is simple yet elegant, suitable for urban interiors or contemporary residential settings.
description: A modern bed with an olive green upholstered headboard, wooden frame, and a white-sheeted mattress, featuring a clean and minimal design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall, olive green headboard, white mattress, and wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the bed's low profile, upholstered side panels, and the thickness of the mattress.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dark back panel of the headboard and the wooden frame's rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the clean lines and consistent materials.
